name: Funnel Analysis
description: Track conversion through multi-step funnel and calculate drop-off rates

config.sql:
SELECT 
  user_id,
  session_id,
  max(case when event_name = 'page_view' then 1 else 0 end) as step1_view,
  max(case when event_name = 'add_to_cart' then 1 else 0 end) as step2_cart,
  max(case when event_name = 'checkout' then 1 else 0 end) as step3_checkout,
  max(case when event_name = 'purchase' then 1 else 0 end) as step4_purchase
FROM {{input}}
GROUP BY user_id, session_id

SELECT 
  step_order,
  event,
  unique_users,
  FIRST_VALUE(unique_users) OVER (ORDER BY step_order) as total_starting_users,
  unique_users * 100.0 / FIRST_VALUE(unique_users) OVER (ORDER BY step_order) as pct_of_starting_users,
  unique_users * 100.0 / NULLIF(LAG(unique_users, 1) OVER (ORDER BY step_order), 0) as pct_of_previous_step
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY step_order
